name: insurance underwriting teams processing 10-20 policy changes/month tool
description: For insurance underwriting teams processing 10-20 policy changes/month, missed compliance updates cause regulatory penalties. We provide automated compliance monitoring instead of manual tracking of policy changes.

problem_solved: Inability to keep up with frequent policy changes
